mapper.select: SELECT a.primary_business_process AS business1Name, a.secondary_business_process AS business2Name, a.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, a.audit_model_name AS modelName, a.audit_business_logic AS auditBusinessLogic, a.execution_logic AS executionLogic, a.subordinate_to_system AS dataToSystem, a.expected_risks AS expectedAuditFind, a."model_code" AS modelCode, a.model_code_file_id AS modelCodeFileId, a.business_area businessArea, a.source_domain sourceDomain, a."audit_model_number" AS modelNumber, b."audit_model_number" AS modelNumber, b."assetCode" AS assetcode, b."code" AS englishName, b."name" AS "chineseName", b."interId" AS interid, b."interName" AS innerName, c."dock_people" autoPeople, c."dock_deputy" autoDeputy, c."dock_dept" autoDeptName FROM (SELECT * FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_info WHERE "audit_model_number" = CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') LIMIT 1 ) a LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM hpeapm.spl_model_type WHERE "audit_model_number" = CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')) c ON a."audit_model_number" = c."audit_model_number" LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_data_support_v2" WHERE isdel = '1' AND "audit_model_number" = CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')) b ON a."audit_model_number" = b."audit_model_number"

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT "_abc"."auditPointNumber" AS "auditPointNumber", "_abc"."auditPointName" AS "auditPointName", "_abc"."auditModelNumber" AS "auditModelNumber", "_abc"."auditModelName" AS "auditModelName", "_abc"."dockPeople" AS "dockPeople", "_abc"."dockDepartment" AS "dockDepartment", "_abc"."primaryBusinessProcess" AS "primaryBusinessProcess", "_abc"."secondaryBusinessProcess" AS "secondaryBusinessProcess", "_abc"."informationSources" AS "informationSources", "_abc"."typeOfInformation" AS "typeOfInformation", "_abc"."detailedTime" AS "detailedTime", "_abc"."isOnline" AS "isOnline", "supp"."code" AS "dataCode", "supp"."assetCode" AS "assetCode", "supp"."name" AS "name", "supp"."originalSystemcode" AS "originalSystemcode", "supp"."originalSystem" AS "originalSystem", "supp"."interId" AS "interId", "supp"."interName" AS "interName", "supp"."status" AS "dataStatus", "supp"."objLevelCode" AS "objLevelCode", "supp"."busiType" AS "busiType", "is_acc" AS "isAcc", "supp"."data_supporter" AS "dataSupporter", "cut"."data_content_description_xq" AS "dataContentDescriptionXq", "cut"."involved_system" AS "involvedSystem", "cut"."scope_of_data_xq" AS "scopeOfDataXq", CASE WHEN "_abc"."existing_data_of_model"=1 THEN '是' WHEN "_abc"."existing_data_of_model"=0 THEN '否' ELSE '部分满足' END AS "existingDataOfModel", "_abc"."remark" AS "remark" FROM ( SELECT "b"."audit_point_number" AS "auditPointNumber", "b"."audit_point_name" AS "auditPointName", "b"."audit_model_number" AS "auditModelNumber", "b"."audit_model_name" AS "auditModelName", "b"."primary_business_process" AS "primaryBusinessProcess", "b"."secondary_business_process" AS "secondaryBusinessProcess", "b"."is_online" AS "isOnline", "b"."information_sources" AS "informationSources", "a"."dock_people" AS "dockPeople", "a"."dock_department" AS "dockDepartment", "a"."type_of_information" AS "typeOfInformation", "b"."existing_data_of_model" AS "existing_data_of_model", "support_remark" AS "remark", "a"."detailed_time" AS "detailedTime" FROM ( SELECT "audit_model_number", "dock_people", "dock_department", "type_of_information", "detailed_time" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE "information_type" = '数据支撑能力' AND "delete_status" = '1'
AND "dock_people" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%')
AND "dock_department" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')
AND "is_import" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{isImport}, '%')
)a JOIN( SELECT "primary_business_process", "secondary_business_process", "information_sources", "audit_point_number", "audit_point_name", "audit_model_number", "audit_model_name", "existing_data_of_model", "is_online", "support_remark" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_info" where 1=1
and "offline"!='1'
AND "primary_business_process" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND "secondary_business_process" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND "information_sources" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{informationSources}, '%')
AND "audit_point_number" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%')
AND "audit_point_name" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%')
AND "audit_model_number" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
AND "audit_model_name" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%')
)b ON "a"."audit_model_number" = "b"."audit_model_number" ORDER BY "a"."detailed_time" desc
)_abc LEFT JOIN( SELECT "assetCode", "code", "name", "originalSystemcode", "originalSystem", "interId", "interName", "objLevelCode", "busiType", "status", "data_supporter", "audit_model_number", "is_acc" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_data_support_v2" WHERE "isdel" = '1' )supp ON "_abc"."auditModelNumber" = "supp"."audit_model_number" LEFT JOIN( SELECT "data_content_description_xq", "involved_system", "scope_of_data_xq", "audit_model_number" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_data_cut_in" WHERE "isdel" = '1' )cut ON "supp"."audit_model_number" = "cut"."audit_model_number" )a where 1=1 ORDER BY "detailedTime" desc

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "_abc"."auditModelNumber") AS "result" FROM ( SELECT "b"."audit_point_number" AS "auditPointNumber", "b"."audit_point_name" AS "auditPointName", "b"."audit_model_number" AS "auditModelNumber", "b"."audit_model_name" AS "auditModelName", "b"."primary_business_process" AS "primaryBusinessProcess", "b"."secondary_business_process" AS "secondaryBusinessProcess", "b"."information_sources" AS "informationSources", "a"."dock_people" AS "dockPeople", "a"."dock_department" AS "dockDepartment", "b"."existing_data_of_model" AS "existing_data_of_model", "support_remark" AS "remark" FROM ( SELECT "audit_model_number", "dock_people", "dock_department" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE "information_type" = '数据支撑能力' AND "delete_status" = '1'
AND "dock_people" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%')
AND "dock_department" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')
AND "is_import" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{isImport}, '%')
)a JOIN( SELECT "primary_business_process", "secondary_business_process", "information_sources", "audit_point_number", "audit_point_name", "audit_model_number", "audit_model_name", "existing_data_of_model", "support_remark" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1=1
AND "offline" != '1'
AND "primary_business_process" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND "secondary_business_process" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND "information_sources" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{informationSources}, '%')
AND "audit_point_number" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%')
AND "audit_point_name" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%')
AND "audit_model_number" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
AND "audit_model_name" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%')
)b ON "a"."audit_model_number" = "b"."audit_model_number" )_abc LEFT JOIN( SELECT "data_interface_name", "data_content_description", "scope_of_data", "data_domain", "data_access_source", "data_attribution_system", "data_access_time", "data_retention_cycle", "structured_data_not", "audit_model_number", "data_supporter" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_data_support" WHERE "isdel" = '1' )supp ON "_abc"."auditModelNumber" = "supp"."audit_model_number" LEFT JOIN( SELECT "data_content_description_xq", "involved_system", "scope_of_data_xq", "audit_model_number" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_data_cut_in" WHERE "isdel" = '1' )cut ON "supp"."audit_model_number" = "cut"."audit_model_number" )a WHERE 1=1

SELECT * from ( SELECT _abc.auditPointNumber, _abc.auditPointName, _abc.auditModelNumber, _abc.auditModelName, _abc.primaryBusinessProcess, _abc.secondaryBusinessProcess, _abc.dockPeople as dockPeople, _abc.dockDepartment as dockDepartment, _abc.remark as remark, _abc.existingDataOfModel as existingDataOfModel, sedc.assetCode as assetCode, sedc.dataCode as dataCode, sedc.name as name, sedc.originalSystemcode as originalSystemcode, sedc.originalSystem as originalSystem, sedc.interId as interId, sedc.interName as interName, sedc.objLevelCode as objLevelCode, sedc.busiType as busiType, sedc.dataStatus as dataStatus, sedc.dataSupporter as dataSupporter, case when sedc.isAcc=1 then '是' else '否' end as isAcc, sedc.data_content_description_xq as dataContentDescriptionXq, sedc.involved_system as involvedSystem, sedc.scope_of_data_xq as scopeOfDataXq from ( SELECT sic.audit_model_number, supp.assetCode as assetCode, supp.code as dataCode, supp.name as name, supp.originalSystemcode as originalSystemcode, supp.originalSystem as originalSystem, supp.interId as interId, supp.interName as interName, supp.objLevelCode as objLevelCode, supp.busiType as busiType, supp.status as dataStatus, supp.data_supporter as dataSupporter, supp.is_acc as isAcc, cut.data_content_description_xq, cut.involved_system, cut.scope_of_data_xq from ( SELECT id, assetCode, "code", "name", originalSystemcode, originalSystem, interId, interName, objLevelCode, busiType, "status", data_supporter, audit_model_number, is_acc FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_data_support_v2" WHERE 1 = 1 AND isdel='1'
AND audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
)supp RIGHT JOIN (SELECT * from hpeapm.audit_supp_in_cut where 1=1
AND audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
)as sic on supp.id=sic.supp_id RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT id, data_content_description_xq, involved_system, scope_of_data_xq, audit_model_number FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_data_cut_in" WHERE isdel = '1'
AND audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
)cut on sic.cut_id=cut.id UNION SELECT sic.audit_model_number, supp.assetCode as assetCode, supp.code as dataCode, supp.name as name, supp.originalSystemcode as originalSystemcode, supp.originalSystem as originalSystem, supp.interId as interId, supp.interName as interName, supp.objLevelCode as objLevelCode, supp.busiType as busiType, supp.status as dataStatus, supp.data_supporter as dataSupporter, supp.is_acc as isAcc, cut.data_content_description_xq, cut.involved_system, cut.scope_of_data_xq from ( SELECT id, assetCode, "code", "name", originalSystemcode, originalSystem, interId, interName, objLevelCode, busiType, "status", data_supporter, audit_model_number, is_acc FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_data_support_v2" WHERE 1 = 1 AND isdel='1'
AND audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
)supp LEFT JOIN (SELECT * from hpeapm.audit_supp_in_cut where 1=1
AND audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
)as sic on supp.id=sic.supp_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT id, data_content_description_xq, involved_system, scope_of_data_xq, audit_model_number FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_data_cut_in" WHERE isdel = '1'
AND audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
)cut on sic.cut_id=cut.id)sedc RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.primary_business_process as primaryBusinessProcess, b.secondary_business_process as secondaryBusinessProcess, b.information_sources as informationSources, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department as dockDepartment, a.type_of_information as typeOfInformation, case when b.existing_data_of_model=1 then '是' when b.existing_data_of_model=0 then '否' else '部分满足' end as existingDataOfModel, support_remark as remark FROM ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, type_of_information FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE information_type = '数据支撑能力' AND delete_status = '1'
AND audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
AND dock_people LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%')
AND dock_department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')
AND audit_point_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%')
AND audit_point_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%')
)a JOIN( SELECT primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, information_sources, audit_point_number, audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, existing_data_of_model, support_remark FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" where 1=1
and offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process LIKE CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND secondary_business_process LIKE CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
AND audit_model_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%')
AND audit_point_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%')
AND audit_point_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%')
)b ON a.audit_model_number=b.audit_model_number )_abc on sedc.audit_model_number=_abc.auditModelNumber)axc where axc.auditModelNumber != '' ORDER BY axc.auditModelNumber asc

SELECT DISTINCT a."audit_point_name" AS auditPointNumber, a."audit_point_name" AS auditPointName FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" a LEFT JOIN hpeapm."spl_model_type" b ON a."audit_model_number" = b."audit_model_number" WHERE a."audit_point_name" IS NOT NULL AND a."audit_point_name" != ''
AND b."dock_dept" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')

SELECT DISTINCT a.audit_model_name AS "auditModelNumber", a.audit_model_name AS "auditModelName" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_info" a LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."spl_model_type" b ON a."audit_model_number" = b."audit_model_number" WHERE a.audit_model_name IS NOT NULL AND a.audit_model_name != ''
AND a.audit_point_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%')
AND b."dock_dept" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')

SELECT DISTINCT b."audit_model_name" AS "auditModelNumber", b."audit_model_name" AS "auditModelName" FROM "hpeapm"."spl_mainten_db" a LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."audit_elements_info" b ON a."model_no" = b."audit_model_number" WHERE a."role_id" = '6E1774EFE55D4F96857ECFBC30573E73' AND b."audit_point_name" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%')

SELECT a."cut_id" AS cutId, a."audit_model_number" AS auditModelNumber FROM hpeapm.audit_supp_in_cut a WHERE a."audit_model_number" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND a."cut_id" IS NOT NULL
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM hpeapm.audit_supp_in_cut WHERE 1=1 AND "audit_model_number" in
CONCAT('%', #{auditModel}, '%')
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT "dock_people" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE "dock_people" IS NOT NULL AND "dock_people" !=''
AND "dock_department" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')
AND "delete_status"=1

SELECT DISTINCT "primary_business_process_id" AS "id", "primary_business_process" AS "name" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_business_process" WHERE "primary_business_process" IS NOT NULL AND "primary_business_process" !=''

SELECT DISTINCT "secondary_business_process_id" AS "id", "secondary_business_process" AS "name" FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_business_process" WHERE "secondary_business_process" IS NOT NULL AND "secondary_business_process" !=''
AND "primary_business_process" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{business1}, '%')

select id,audit_point_number,audit_point_name,audit_model_number,audit_model_name,primary_business_process,secondary_business_process,existing_data_of_model,support_remark from hpeapm.audit_elements_info where 1=1
AND audit_model_number=#{auditModelNumber}

select data_access_time from hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support where 1=1
AND audit_model_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
AND isdel=1 order by data_access_time asc LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support
data_interface_name=#{dataInterfaceName},
data_content_description=#{dataContentDescription},
scope_of_data=#{scopeOfData}, data_domain=#{dataDomain}, data_access_source=#{dataAccessSource},
data_attribution_system=#{dataAttributionSystem},
data_access_time=#{dataAccessTime},
data_retention_cycle=#{dataRetentionCycle},
structured_data_not=#{structuredDataNotId},
data_supporter=#{dataSupporter},
WHERE audit_model_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
AND id=#{id}

UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support_v2 set isdel=0
WHERE audit_model_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hpeapm."audit_elements_data_support_v2" (id, audit_model_number, assetCode, code, "name", originalSystemcode, originalSystem, interId, interName, objLevelCode, busiType, status, data_supporter, is_acc) VALUES (#{id}, #{auditModelNumber}, #{assetCode}, #{dataCode}, #{name}, #{originalSystemcode}, #{originalSystem}, #{interId}, #{interName}, #{objLevelCode}, #{busiType}, #{dataStatus}, #{dataSupporter}, #{isAcc})
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS id, a."audit_model_number" AS auditModelNumber, REPLACE(a."assetCode", '
', '') AS assetCode, REPLACE(a."code", '
', '') AS dataCode, REPLACE(a."name", '
', '') AS "name", REPLACE(a.originalSystemcode, '
', '') AS originalSystemcode, REPLACE(a."originalSystem", '
', '') AS originalSystem, REPLACE(a."interId", '
', '') AS interId, REPLACE(a.interName, '
', '') AS interName, REPLACE(a.objLevelCode, '
', '') AS objLevelCode, REPLACE(a.busiType, '
', '') AS busiType, REPLACE(a."status", '
', '') AS dataStatus, REPLACE(a."data_supporter", '
', '') AS dataSupporter, REPLACE(a."is_acc", '
', '') AS isAcc FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_data_support_v2" a WHERE a.isdel = '1'
select DISTINCT data_interface_number as 'value', data_interface_name as label from hpeapm.audit_data_assets where 1 = 1

select data_content_description_id as 'value', CONCAT(data_content_description, '(', data_content_description_id, ')') as label from hpeapm.audit_data_assets where 1=1
AND data_interface_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceNameId}, '%')
AND data_interface_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceName}, '%')

select scope_of_data as label, scope_of_data as 'value' from hpeapm.audit_data_assets where 1=1
AND data_interface_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceNameId}, '%')
AND data_interface_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceName}, '%')
AND data_content_description_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescriptionId}, '%')
AND data_content_description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescription}, '%')

select data_domain as label, data_domain as 'value' from hpeapm.audit_data_assets where 1=1
AND data_interface_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceNameId}, '%')
AND data_interface_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceName}, '%')
AND data_content_description_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescriptionId}, '%')
AND data_content_description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescription}, '%')

select case when structured_data_not='是' then '1' else '0' end as structuredDataNotId from hpeapm.audit_data_assets where 1=1
AND data_interface_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceNameId}, '%')
AND data_interface_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceName}, '%')
AND data_content_description_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescriptionId}, '%')
AND data_content_description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescription}, '%')

select IFNULL(data_retention_cycle,'') as label, IFNULL(data_retention_cycle,'') as 'value' from hpeapm.audit_data_assets where 1=1
AND data_interface_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceNameId}, '%')
AND data_interface_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceName}, '%')
AND data_content_description_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescriptionId}, '%')
AND data_content_description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescription}, '%')

select IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE((data_access_time,'01'),"%Y%m%d"),"%Y-%m-%d") ,'')as 'value' from hpeapm.audit_data_assets where 1=1
AND data_interface_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceNameId}, '%')
AND data_interface_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceName}, '%')
AND data_content_description_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescriptionId}, '%')
AND data_content_description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescription}, '%')

select data_attribution_system as label, data_attribution_system as 'value' from hpeapm.audit_data_assets where 1=1
AND data_interface_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceNameId}, '%')
AND data_interface_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataInterfaceName}, '%')
AND data_content_description_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescriptionId}, '%')
AND data_content_description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescription}, '%')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support ( data_interface_name, data_content_description, scope_of_data, data_domain, data_access_source, data_attribution_system, data_access_time, data_retention_cycle, structured_data_not, audit_model_number, data_supporter, isdel ) VALUES
( #{emp.dataInterfaceName}, #{emp.dataContentDescription}, #{emp.scopeOfData}, #{emp.dataDomain}, #{emp.dataAccessSource}, #{emp.dataAttributionSystem}, #{emp.dataAccessTime}, #{emp.dataRetentionCycle}, #{emp.structuredDataNotId}, #{emp.auditModelNumber}, #{emp.dataSupporter}, '1' )

INSERT INTO hpeapm.audit_elements_data_cut_in ( data_content_description_xq, involved_system, scope_of_data_xq, audit_model_number, isdel ) VALUES
( #{emp.dataContentDescriptionXq}, #{emp.involvedSystem}, #{emp.scopeOfDataXq}, #{emp.auditModelNumber}, '1' )
mapper.select:
select * from hpeapm.audit_supp_in_cut where 1=1
AND supp_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{suppId}, '%')
AND audit_model_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT DISTINCT sys_x2 AS "label", sys_x2 AS "value" FROM hpeapm.map_system_list WHERE approv_status = 'success' AND CURRENT_TIMESTAMP BETWEEN "start_time" AND "end_time" AND effec_status = 'Y'

SELECT DISTINCT assetCode AS assetCode, "code" AS dataCode, "name" AS "name", originalSystemcode AS originalSystemcode, originalSystem AS originalSystem, interId AS interId, interName AS interName, objLevelCode AS objLevelCode, busiType AS busiType, "status" AS dataStatus FROM hpeapm."audit_assets_data" WHERE 1 = 1
AND "code" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND "name" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
LIMIT 1

SELECT id FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" a WHERE audit_model_number IN
CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
